title: Career and Leadership Advice for Anyone Feeling Behind in the AI Era | Snowflake, Sridhar Ramaswamy
summary: Sridhar Ramaswamy, CEO of Snowflake, discusses career and leadership lessons from his experience at Google, founding the failed search engine Neeva, and now leading Snowflake through the AI era. He shares principles on product building, hiring adaptable talent, staying close to the product, and maintaining identity beyond successes and failures.
writeup: Sridhar Ramaswamy, CEO of Snowflake, draws career and leadership lessons from his time at Google, his founding of the search engine Neeva (which failed), and his current work leading Snowflake through the AI era. The discussion covers principles for product building, hiring adaptable talent, staying close to the product as a leader, and maintaining a sense of identity that is separate from any given success or failure. The framing emphasizes navigating product-market fit and leadership for people who feel behind as AI reshapes work.
